title: Fix 13 historical unchecked errors flagged by errcheck
goal: Resolve the 13 errcheck issues present on main (current .golangci.yml config, check-type-assertions enabled). Apply the repo's documented convention for deliberately-ignored errors: explicit `_ = err` / `_, _ = f()` ignore for best-effort/cleanup paths, matching the comment in backend/.golangci.yml ('idiomatic `_ = err` for deliberately ignored errors is allowed; avoids no-op ignoreError() helpers'). No suppression via exclude-functions, no behavioral change.

in: backend/internal/scaffold/workspace.go: ignore os.Remove + file.Close in defer
backend/pkg/database/migrate.go: ignore m.Close (2-value), db.Close, tx.Rollback in defer
out: any change to lint rules / exclude-functions (convention unchanged)
any behavioral/logic change (pure error-handling annotation only)

taskDoc: Carried over from v0.9.0 leftover #1 (errcheck historical unchecked errors, previously estimated ~45, measured 13 under current config). User decision 2026-07-21: fix per repo standard `_ =` convention. ops upgrade to base-v0.9.0 deferred by user (not started).
